siteName.label: Site Name
siteName.hint: Displayed in the header, footer, browser tab, and SEO metadata. This is the primary identifier for your site.

primaryColor.label: Primary Color
primaryColor.hint: Main brand color — buttons, links, headings

secondaryColor.label: Secondary Color
secondaryColor.hint: Accent color — highlights, badges, secondary buttons

accentColor.label: Accent Color
accentColor.hint: Tertiary color — success states, decorative elements

logoLight.label: Logo (Light Mode)
logoLight.placeholder: /logo.svg or click Upload to add an image
logoLight.hint: Displayed in the header. Recommended: SVG or PNG with transparent background. Ideal size: 120x40px.

logoDark.label: Logo (Dark Mode)
logoDark.placeholder: /logo-dark.svg or click Upload to add an image
logoDark.hint: Displayed in the header on dark backgrounds. Usually a lighter version of the main logo.

favicon.label: Favicon
favicon.placeholder: /favicon.ico or click Upload to add an image
favicon.hint: Browser tab icon. Use .ico, .png, or .svg format. Recommended size: 32x32px or 16x16px.

titleEn.label: Hero Title (English)
titleEn.hint: Main heading displayed prominently on the homepage hero section. Keep it short and impactful.

subtitleEn.label: Subtitle (English)
subtitleEn.placeholder: I bring stories to life through animation and design...

subtitleAm.label: Subtitle (Amharic)
subtitleAm.placeholder: በአኒሜሽን እና ዲዛይን ታሪኮችን ህያው አደርጋለሁ...

backgroundImage.label: Background Image
backgroundImage.placeholder: https://res.cloudinary.com/... or click Upload to add an image
backgroundImage.hint: Full-width background image for the hero section. Recommended: 1920x1080px, JPG or WebP format. Keep file size under 500KB for fast loading.

profilePhoto.label: Profile Photo
profilePhoto.placeholder: https://res.cloudinary.com/... or click Upload to add a photo
profilePhoto.hint: Your profile photo displayed in the hero section. Recommended: portrait orientation, at least 400x500px. JPG or PNG format. Leave empty to hide the photo.

profilePhoto.label: Profile Photo
profilePhoto.placeholder: /images/profile.jpg or click Upload to add a photo
profilePhoto.hint: Your photo displayed on the About page. Recommended: square aspect ratio, at least 400x400px. JPG or PNG format.

bioEn.label: Bio (English)
bioEn.hint: Introduce yourself to visitors. Keep it professional and engaging. Share your journey, passion, and what makes you unique.

videoUrl.label: Showreel Video URL
videoUrl.hint: Supports YouTube, Vimeo, Google Drive, and Cloudinary video links. This is the main demo reel that plays on the Showreel page.

posterUrl.label: Video Poster / Thumbnail
posterUrl.placeholder: https://res.cloudinary.com/... or click Upload to add an image
posterUrl.hint: Image displayed before the video plays. Recommended 16:9 aspect ratio (1280x720px).

descriptionEn.label: Description (English)
descriptionEn.placeholder: A collection of my best animation and motion design work.

subtitleEn.label: Subtitle (English)
subtitleEn.placeholder: A structured approach to turning ideas into compelling visuals

subtitleEn.label: Subtitle (English)
subtitleEn.placeholder: Explore my latest projects across animation, design, and architecture.

titleTemplate.label: Title Template
titleTemplate.hint: Use %s where the page title should appear. Example: "About | Feven Zerabruk"

defaultDescription.label: Default Meta Description
defaultDescription.placeholder: Portfolio of Feven Zerabruk, a professional 2D animator...

ogImage.label: Social Share Image (OG Image)
ogImage.placeholder: https://res.cloudinary.com/... or click Upload to add an image
ogImage.hint: Recommended size: 1200x630px. This image appears when your site is shared on social media.

googleAnalyticsId.label: Google Analytics ID
googleAnalyticsId.hint: Google Analytics measurement ID for tracking site traffic and visitor behavior.
